arguments.task: Open Gumroad official API pages and read the page content. Then navigate only to official Gumroad first-party pages needed to verify: product/API description, authentication methods, whether OAuth or access tokens are documented, API surface style, rate limits, and any pricing or access gating relevant to using the API. Return the canonical URLs visited and concise evidence-backed findings with quoted page text where useful. Avoid third-party sources.

input.thought: Start a browser run to inspect official Gumroad documentation pages directly.

raw_result.description: Gumroad provides a REST API for accessing and managing Gumroad resources such as products, sales, subscribers, and user data.
raw_result.auth_notes: The official API page documents OAuth 2.0 authorization and access tokens for authenticated requests.
raw_result.gating_reason: The official pricing page presents Gumroad as self-serve with platform transaction-based pricing and no separate API access sales gate shown in the gathered evidence.

api_surface.breadth: Official API docs describe endpoints and resources for products, sales, subscribers, user information, and related Gumroad account data.
api_surface.mcp_notes: No official MCP server or MCP documentation was identified in the gathered first-party pages.

raw_result.rate_limit_notes: No API rate-limit details were identified on the gathered official pages.
raw_result.notable_signals: Official first-party API documentation exists at a stable canonical URL, and the browser run verified REST API positioning plus documented OAuth and access-token authentication.

result.description: Gumroad provides a REST API for accessing and managing Gumroad resources such as products, sales, subscribers, and user data.
result.auth_notes: The official API page documents OAuth 2.0 authorization and access tokens for authenticated requests.
result.gating_reason: The official pricing page presents Gumroad as self-serve with platform transaction-based pricing and no separate API access sales gate shown in the gathered evidence.

api_surface.breadth: Official API docs describe endpoints and resources for products, sales, subscribers, user information, and related Gumroad account data.
api_surface.mcp_notes: No official MCP server or MCP documentation was identified in the gathered first-party pages.

result.rate_limit_notes: No API rate-limit details were identified on the gathered official pages.
result.notable_signals: Official first-party API documentation exists at a stable canonical URL, and the browser run verified REST API positioning plus documented OAuth and access-token authentication.
